Assembly: The assembly iyAndDors1.1 is based on 40x PacBio data, 10X Genomics Chromium data, and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project (https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm, retained haplotig separation with purge_dups, short-read polishing using FreeBayes-called variants from 10X Genomics Chromium reads aligned with LongRanger, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHifi. Finally, the assembly was analysed and manually improved using rapid curation. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. Heterozygous inversions in chromosome 3 8.8-20.0mb, 12.9-35.7mb, 34.5-67.3mb.

Assembly: The assembly dcHonPepl1.hap1.1 is based on 29x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial and chloroplast genomes were assembled using OATK. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. Heterozygous inversions were observed on the following chromosomes of this assembly: Chromosome 15 ~60.5-68.4 Mbp, Chromosome 16 ~45.8-61 Mbp, Chromosome 23 ~41.5-69.5 Mbp and Chromosome 33 ~25.6-60 Mbp.
